{{- $theme := printf ".chroma-%s .chroma" . }} {{- $style := "" }} {{- with add "css/huggingface/styles/chroma/" . "-light.css" }} {{- warnf "CSS: loading style: %s" . -}} {{- with resources.Get . }} {{- $style = replace (.Content | replaceRE `\/\* (Background|PreWrapper) \*\/(.*?)\}` "/* $1 $2 }*/") ".chroma" $theme }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "CSS: failed to load style: %s" . -}} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{- with add "css/huggingface/styles/chroma/" . "-dark.css" }} {{- warnf "CSS: loading style: %s" . -}} {{- with resources.Get . }} {{ $content := replace (.Content | replaceRE `\/\* (Background|PreWrapper) \*\/(.*?)\}` "/* $1 $2 }*/" | replaceRE `\.dark\s+` "") ".chroma" $theme }} {{- $style = add $style "@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {\nhtml:not([data-theme]) {" }} {{- $style = add $style $content }} {{- $style = add $style "}}" }} {{- $style = add $style `html[data-theme="dark"] {` }} {{- $style = add $style $content }} {{- $style = add $style "}" }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "CSS: failed to load style: %s" . -}} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{- $syntaxStyle := add "/css/chroma-" . ".css" }} {{- with resources.FromString $syntaxStyle $style }} {{- else }} {{- warnf "CSS publishing syntax style failed: %s" $syntaxStyle }} {{- end }}
